distributor.desc: In 2018, GoldenHome proudly announced the Grand Opening of its first Distribution Center in Canada — Toronto Distribution Center. This expansion allows GoldenHome to extend its reach to more customers in Canada, and firmly establish the GoldenHome Cabinet brand offering beautiful, high-quality modern cabinetry at affordable prices to more families.

quote_section.desc: Subscribe to GoldenHome and receive a complimentary design consultation.
